page_summary: A page showing two 3D magic cubes made of 3x3 rhombic grids with numbers, accompanied by headings and explanatory text in Ethiopic (Ge'ez) script.
text_blocks: የአራተኛውን ቁልፍ ማጠቃለያ እና ዕለታዊ አጠቃቀም፤ አምስቱ እና ስድስቱ ቁልፎች ጋር የሚሰሩ ምሳጌዎች።
የአምስተኛው ቁልፍ ዋና ባህሪዎች እና ልዩ ሥራዎች።

colored_text.approximate_position: centered between the first (upper) and second (lower) magic cube
centered below the second (lower) magic cube

decorations.description: Upper 3D magic cube composed of three stacked 3x3 rhombic grids (parallelogram cells) with numerical entries, drawn with dashed vertical edges to convey 3D depth.
components: dashed vertical lines connecting the three layers

decorations.description: Lower 3D magic cube composed of three stacked 3x3 rhombic grids with numerical entries, drawn with dashed vertical edges to convey 3D depth.
components: dashed vertical lines connecting the three layers

uncertain_or_unreadable: The Ethiopic/Ge'ez text content is partially uncertain; characters such as the circled numerals and certain conjuncts (e.g. ፤፤, ሐ, ጐ, ጸ) could not be transcribed with full confidence.
Exact transliteration of the red subheadings is approximate.
